_doc: Epic #3822 C3 / #3827 — the committed >=90 council rating for THIS deliverable (AC-E2). Three GENUINELY DISJOINT non-Anthropic families rated the design+diff against #3827's ACs and the goal-lens, web-research-grounded, citing the actual files. The binding cross-family receipt (kind:review) is 26cc921fc28188c8 in governance/cross-family-consensus.jsonl (meta+mistral PASS, >=2 non-authoring families, un-forgeable hash chain). rater_categories = the binary meets-bar (>=90) decision per family, consumed by self-governance-replay-eval.js#gwetAC1 -> 1.0 (chance-corrected, Landis-Koch almost-perfect; robust to the high-agreement skew that collapses Cohen/Fleiss kappa). Two raters of the SAME family would not count as two; these three are mistral / meta / qwen.

iteration_history.note: pre-fix diff: mistral 94, meta(groq) 85, qwen-slot(fleet down->free-cloud meta) 88; median 88 < 90. Disagreement-aware signal: all raters flagged deferral of the two G4 under-catches to a follow-on as the score-limiting weakness (G4 lens).

folded the weakness in (research-redteam loop): closed both G4 under-catches in-scope in hooks/scripts/ask_reference_monitor.py; empirical carve-out recall 3/5 -> 5/5. Re-rated on 3 genuinely disjoint families.
